title_original: Rigetti Computing Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results | Rigetti & Co, LLC
summary_original: Rigetti Computing reported $7.1 million in 2025 revenue and a full-year GAAP net loss of $216.2 million, with $589.8 million in cash and equivalents as of December 31, 2025. Key scientific milestones include achieving 99.9% two-qubit gate fidelity at a 28-nanosecond speed on a prototype platform and median two-qubit gate fidelities of 99.7% (9-qubit), 99.6% (36-qubit), and 99% (108-qubit) systems. In 2025, Rigetti received an $8.4 million order from India’s Centre for Development of Advanced Computing for a 108-qubit system and advanced chiplet-based scaling. The company emphasizes ongoing progress in error correction through its partnership with Riverlane and focuses on practical quantum advantage and scalable architectures.
